arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lex intent, which uniquely identifies the intent.

checksum.description: A checksum that helps to validate the integrity of the intent's data.

created_date.description: The date and time when the Lex intent was originally created.

description.description: A brief explanation or summary of what the Lex intent does.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Lex intent.

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the Lex intent was last modified.

parent_intent_signature.description: The signature of the parent intent, if the intent is derived from another intent.
